[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 001000100 2
1 110110011 6
2 010000010 2
3 111011111 8
4 101010000 3
5 110011001 5
6 000000000 a
7 111010100 5

01 10 111110111 8
12 21 111100111 7
23 32 111110111 8
34 43 110110011 6 match 1

56 65 111011111 8 match 3
67 76 111011001 6
70 07 111011101 7

02 20 111010100 5 match 7
13 31 111110011 7
24 42 011000110 4
35 53 111111111 a
46 64 111010010 5
57 75 111011111 8 match 3

71 17 111111011 8
